entry.title: New: WAI-3 Bill 16 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
BILL 16 (2025), AUTHORIZING THE MAYOR TO ENTER INTO AN INTERGOVERNMENTAL AGREEMENT WITH THE STATE DEPARTMENT OF LABOR AND INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS, HAWAII OCCUPATIONAL SAFETY AND HEALTH DIVISION, FOR THE SETTLEMENT OF ALLEGED VIOLATIONS AT THE KIHEI WASTEWATER RECLAMATION FACILITY (WAI-3)

Water and Infrastructure Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
